exemplar.title: Creating a video about muscle growth

detailedExemplarData.title: Creating a video about muscle growth

strengths: Demonstrates robust research ATL skills by critically evaluating sources for credibility and relevance.
Effective self-management shown through time-blocking for gym sessions and video editing workflows.
Evidence of persistence and resilience in overcoming low-motivation days and adapting to a knee injury.
Clear examples of adaptability in balancing commitments and adjusting plans in response to setbacks.
weaknesses: Specific ATL skill names (e.g., research, self-management) are not explicitly identified in reflections.
Early planning table does not include updates or justifications when tasks shifted, weakening evidence of dynamic self-management.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: You provide compelling examples of applying ATL skillsâresearch, time-management, resilience, and adaptabilityâto achieve your goals and product. To deepen this analysis, explicitly name each ATL skill when describing your process and document adjustments in your planning table to show how you managed changes in schedule or scope.

strengths: Specific, measurable learning goal focused on muscle-building efficiency and safety grounded in research statistics.
Authentic personal context that establishes clear motivation and relevance for peers.
Concise and focused description of the intended product as a step-by-step instructional video.
Detailed success-criteria table with clear test methods for accuracy and engagement.
weaknesses: Project timeline lacks explicit sequencing rationale and resource identification.
Global-context statement is informative but not directly linked to product design decisions.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The planning section demonstrates strong foundation through a well-articulated, measurable learning goal, a compelling personal context, and a detailed success-criteria table that will guide evaluation. To strengthen this planning further, you should sequence tasks in the timeline with dependencies, identify specific resources or personnel for each stage, and explicitly tie insights from the global-context statement to your design choices.

strengths: Incorporates direct feedback from a gym owner to demonstrate how well the product meets user needs.
Identifies a specific form correction (bench-press elbow flare), showing detailed product evaluation.
Honest overall evaluation of both challenges and successes, indicating strong self-awareness.
weaknesses: Engagement with the intended audience was not formally assessed through metrics or feedback tools.
Limited detail on how identified mistakes will be integrated into the next iteration of the video.
Concluding reflection lacks a concrete action plan outlining steps to refine editing flow and content polish.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your reflections are grounded in specific feedback and show genuine self-assessment of strengths and areas for growth. To elevate this section, design formal measures to assess audience engagement, detail how you will incorporate corrections into your product iteration, and create a targeted action plan for improving editing and content quality in future versions.

annotations.comment: You clearly articulate a specific learning goal focused on muscle-building efficiency and safety, grounded in research statistics. This provides a strong, measurable foundation for your project.
Your opening personal context establishes genuine motivation and empathy, which strengthens the relevance of your project for peers facing similar body-image challenges.
Your intended product description is concise and focused, outlining clear expectations for an actionable, step-by-step instructional video.
The personal-interest section effectively connects your own experiences with project objectives, demonstrating a convincing link between learning goals and personal motivation.
You title this section âResearch and Self managementâ but do not explicitly name which ATL skills you applied. Add reflections on how research and self-management skills guided your process.
You demonstrate strong research ATL skills by evaluating sources for credibility, relevance and evidence, ensuring your content is accurate and trustworthy.
The product success-criteria table is detailed, with clear test methods for accuracy and engagement, demonstrating thorough planning for evaluating your videoâs impact.
Your project timeline lists tasks and dates but lacks sequencing rationale and resource identification. Consider adding dependencies and specifying tools or personnel needed for each stage.
The self-management section explains time-blocking for gym sessions and editing, illustrating practical ATL time-management skills.
Your reflection on discipline and motivation highlights how you overcame low-motivation days, demonstrating persistence and resilience ATL skills.
Your planning and organization description details adjusting to a knee injury and balancing commitments, showcasing effective self-management and adaptability.
The early plan table lists tasks but omits new dates or justifications. Provide updates or notes when tasks shift to evidence your self-management adjustments.
You gathered direct feedback on informative content from your gym owner, offering concrete evidence for how well your instructions meet user needs.
You identified a specific form correction (bench-press elbow flare) from expert feedback, which shows detailed product evaluation and an opportunity for targeted improvement.
Engagement was not formally assessed. Consider designing questions or metrics for this criterion to provide fully supported evidence of audience impact.
Your success-criteria evaluation for common mistakes lacks depth on how corrections will be integrated. Add next steps to demonstrate iteration based on feedback.
Your overall evaluation reflects on both challenges and successes, demonstrating honest self-assessment and awareness of areas for future growth.
The concluding reflection is insightful but would benefit from an action plan outlining specific steps youâll take to refine editing flow and content polish.
Your global-context statement is informative but could better support planning by linking context insights directly to product design decisions.
